title: Chassalia hallii
taxonomy: Chassalia hallii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Chassalia, which is a group of flowering plants found primarily in the tropical regions of Asia. The genus Chassalia is part of the tribe Psychotrieae, which comprises a large number of species within the Rubiaceae family. Chassalia hallii is further classified into the order Lamiales, a group of flowering plants that are often found in tropical and subtropical regions. This classification indicates the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Chassalia hallii within the plant kingdom.
